message:
Running command: MCU_DIR="/workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu"
WRAPPER_DIR="$MCU_DIR/openlane/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu_wrapper"
DEF_TEMPLATE="$WRAPPER_DIR/fixed_dont_change/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu_wrapper.def"

echo "=== DEF template PIN names ==="
grep "^\s*- " "$DEF_TEMPLATE" | head -5
echo ""
# Extract pin names from DEF using broader grep
grep " - " "$DEF_TEMPLATE" | grep -v "COMP\|NET\|ROW\|TRACK\|VIAS\|SPEC\|VERSION\|DESIGN\|UNITS\|DIEAREA" | head -5
echo ""
# Use awk to extract pin names
awk '/^PINS/,/^END PINS/ { if ($1 == "-") print $2 }' "$DEF_TEMPLATE" | sort > /tmp/def_pins.txt
wc -l /tmp/def_pins.txt
head -5 /tmp/def_pins.txt

echo ""
echo "=== wrapper.v port names (from module declaration) ==="
# Get ports from module declaration
awk '/^module mspm33c321a/,/^\);/' "$MCU_DIR/verilog/rtl/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu_wrapper.v" | \
  grep "inout\|input\|output" | \
  sed 's/.*\(inout\|input\|output\)[^A-Za-z_]*\([A-Za-z_][A-Za-z0-9_]*\).*/\2/' | \
  sort > /tmp/wrapper_ports.txt
wc -l /tmp/wrapper_ports.txt
echo ""
echo "=== Ports in wrapper but NOT in DEF (missing pins) ==="
comm -23 /tmp/wrapper_ports.txt /tmp/def_pins.txt | head -20
